title: Sweet and Yummy mod
description: Very yummy mod that adds much different food: from tea to apple in caramel. This is survival mod.
body: This very yummy mod adds much different food, so i'll name them all... Four types of candies: caramel, honey, chocolate, milk candies. Lollipop that orange usually but you can dye it into 4 colors. Caramel, marmalade, strudel and apple juice. Donut, ice cream, chocolate bar and caramel apple. Melted chocolate, chocolate berries, kvass and lemonade. Also, there is a box of candies and four types of tea: cup of black tea, cup of green tea, black tea with oxeye daisy, green tea with oxeye daisy. Oh, do you remember, that bunny passed to you?
